perturbation.original_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA
perturbation.changed_text: Additional Reporting Entity (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'Additional Reporting Person' to 'Additional Reporting Entity' for Merck Serono SA introduces ambiguity. While Merck KGaA is still defined as a 'Person,' it's unclear if 'Entity' and 'Person' have the same obligations under this agreement. This could lead to uncertainty regarding Merck Serono SA's responsibilities, especially considering the document doesn't clarify if they have any different obligations from the other entities.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Additional Reporting Entity (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) Dated: January 7, 2019 ARES TRADING SA ARES TRADING SA By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Luigia Bocola Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Luigia Bocola Title: CFO Title: Finance Manager MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Tearaboth Te Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Tearaboth Te Title: CFO Title: Treasury Director MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY By: /s/ Rando Bruns By: /s/ Tim Nielsen Name: Rando Bruns Name: Tim Nielsen Title: Head of Treasury Title: Head of Capital Markets
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Additional Reporting Person' to 'Additional Reporting Entity' for Merck Serono SA introduces ambiguity because the agreement doesn't clarify if 'Entity' and 'Person' have the same obligations. The contradicted text lists both Merck Serono SA (as an Entity after the change) and Merck KGaA (as a Person) as signatories, but the change introduces uncertainty about their respective responsibilities under the agreement, specifically regarding their reporting obligations which are critical to the contract. This change directly introduces uncertainty because it may be unclear if 'Entity' and 'Person' have the same obligations.
